prior_findings: Plan P1 (sec-gov): 0 must-fix, 2 should-fix (lifecycle prevent_destroy, diagnostic settings), 1 suggestion (KV network ACLs). PASS.

findings.title: Add App Service health check endpoint
findings.description: App Service should configure a health check path (e.g., /health) to enable platform-level restart on unhealthy instances. The implementation plan does not specify this.
findings.recommendation: Add health_check_path = '/health' to the App Service site_config in Task 10.

findings.title: Document single-region failure mode for dev
findings.description: The plan correctly targets single-region dev deployment. Document that swedencentral outage means full downtime, acceptable for dev but needs multi-region for prod.
findings.recommendation: Add a brief note in the Overview acknowledging this as accepted risk for dev tier.

findings.title: Consider SQL Database auto-pause for cost savings
findings.description: Basic tier does not support auto-pause, but if the project upgrades to Serverless tier in future, auto-pause can reduce costs for intermittent dev workloads.
findings.recommendation: Document as a future optimization opportunity.

compact_for_parent: Plan P2 (arch-rel): 0 must-fix, 1 should-fix (health check endpoint), 2 suggestions (single-region doc, SQL auto-pause). PASS.
